title: Add unit tests for bridge server endpoints
body: Write tests for the Gitea webhook bridge server. Cover: webhook parsing, event forwarding, error handling. Use Jest or similar.

title: Add player movement smoothing and collision detection
body: Improve player movement with lerp-based smoothing. Add collision detection with map boundaries and obstacles.

title: Add API rate limiting and input validation
body: Add rate limiting middleware to all API endpoints. Validate all user inputs (search queries, filter params). Return proper 4xx errors for bad input.

title: Add caching layer for product search
body: Cache frequent product searches in Redis or in-memory. Invalidate on product updates. Reduce DB load for repeated queries.

title: Add health check endpoint and monitoring
body: Add /health endpoint that checks DB connection, ML model availability, and disk space. Return structured JSON with component statuses.

title: Optimize image processing pipeline
body: Profile the current image processing pipeline. Reduce memory usage for large shelf images. Add progress tracking for long-running analyses.

title: Implement save/load game state
body: Add localStorage-based save/load for game state including player position, inventory, and quest progress. Auto-save every 60 seconds.

title: Add comprehensive API documentation
body: Generate OpenAPI/Swagger docs from existing endpoints. Add example requests/responses. Document auth flow and error codes.
